return(function(D,X,e,T,K,h,u,B,z,v,Q,Y,x,H,W,k,l,E,R,p,f,w,a,d)k,x,R,v,a,l,f,H,z,Y,W,B,d,w,Q,p,E=function(D,t)local X=E(t)local e=function(e,T,K,h)return x(D,{e;T,K;h},t,X)end return e end,function(x,e,T,K)local zQ={}local P,Eg,Pg,Rg,Sg,G,c,Kg,pQ,XQ,fQ,m,L,Tg,jg,qg,gg,j,S,fg,Zg,f,Lg,Ug,hg,wQ,n,EQ,dg,xQ,V,rg,eQ,J,ag,lg,F,Mg,U,Jg,Dg,r,Yg,TQ,N,A,Og,E,Ag,sg,u,Z,Hg,pg,yg,i,g,uQ,ug,Fg,o,C,KQ,Xg,R,RQ,Bg,mg,YQ,O,eg,DQ,bg,Wg,vg,I,s,hQ,q,ng,Vg,y,kg,p,zg,tg,Qg,aQ,Cg,wg,tQ,Gg,b,ig,Ig,og,cg,xg,Ng,M
